items.summary: In the backend trading loop (tradingLoop() in backend/main.mo), before placing new grid orders each cycle, unconditionally cancel ALL currently open orders by calling the ICDex canister's cancelOrder() for each open order fetched via getOpenOrders(). Only after all cancellations are complete should the new grid orders be placed. No comparison logic, no selective cancellation — cancel every open order on every cycle before repositioning.
